zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne於1205年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延時，她的父親Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne46歲，母親Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan16歲。她於1228年與Comte Pierre de Vendôme I在法國洛易-吉黑波旁_結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1247年4月17日享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne was born in 1205, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne, was 46 and her mother, Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan, was 16. She married Comte Pierre de Vendôme I in 1228, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 17 April 1247, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne est née en 1205, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Comte Pierre de Vendôme I en 1228, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 avril 1247, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne 1205 in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne 46 und ihre Mutter Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan 16. Sie hat 1228 in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich Comte Pierre de Vendôme I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 17. April 1247 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

ko.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne(이)가 1205년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1228년 프랑스 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 Comte Pierre de Vendôme I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 4월 17일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne nasceu em 1205, em Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Comte Pierre de Vendôme I em 1228, em Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 17 de abril de 1247, com 42 anos.

ru.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Gervaise de Mayenne родилась в 1205 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Juhel III de Mayenne, Seigneur de Mayenne было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gervaise de Vitré, Vicomtesse de Dinan, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte Pierre de Vendôme I в 1228 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 17 апреля 1247 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

Se casó con Comte Pierre de Vendôme I en 1228, en Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 17 de abril de 1247, a la edad de 42 años.
